default.title: Initialize Next.js application
default.body: Run `npx create-next-app@latest` to initialize the project using the App Router and setup linting.

framework-specific.title: Configure Next.js image optimization
framework-specific.body: Update `next.config.js` to configure `<Image />` component allowed domains and optimization settings.

framework-specific.title: Setup Next.js global Error and Loading boundaries
framework-specific.body: Add `error.tsx` and `loading.tsx` in the root of the App Router to gracefully handle suspense and critical errors.
